mapper.select:
SELECT product_id, product_code, product_name, category, unit, reorder_point, reorder_qty, unit_cost, is_active, created_at FROM PRODUCT
AND (product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND category = #{searchCategory}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT product_id, product_code, product_name, category, unit, reorder_point, reorder_qty, unit_cost, is_active, created_at FROM PRODUCT WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT (product_code, product_name, category, unit, reorder_point, reorder_qty, unit_cost, is_active) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{category}, #{unit}, #{reorderPoint}, #{reorderQty}, #{unitCost}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET product_code = #{productCode}, product_name = #{productName}, category = #{category}, unit = #{unit}, reorder_point = #{reorderPoint}, reorder_qty = #{reorderQty}, unit_cost = #{unitCost}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SALES_ORDER (so_no, customer_id, order_date, delivery_date, status, created_by) VALUES (#{soNo}, #{customerId}, #{orderDate}, #{deliveryDate}, #{status}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select:
SELECT p.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, p.category, p.unit, p.reorder_point, p.unit_cost, p.is_active, IFNULL(i.qty_on_hand, 0) AS qty_on_hand, IFNULL(i.qty_reserved, 0) AS qty_reserved, w.warehouse_name, w.warehouse_id FROM PRODUCT p LEFT JOIN INVENTORY i ON p.product_id = i.product_id LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE w ON i.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
AND (p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR p.product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
AND p.category = #{searchCategory}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN IFNULL(i.qty_on_hand, 0) <= p.reorder_point THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, i.qty_on_hand ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT WHERE is_active = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT p JOIN INVENTORY i ON p.product_id = i.product_id WHERE i.qty_on_hand <= p.reorder_point AND p.is_active = 1
